hero_subtitle: SFTY supports procurement teams at VASPs by embedding audit trails, role-based access, and evidence integrity into compliance workflows for enterprise readiness and secure governance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness slows without unified control
problem_description: Procurement teams face difficulties verifying compliance workflows when audit evidence and access controls remain dispersed across multiple systems. This fragmentation complicates proof of governance, evidence integrity, and regulatory trust for institutional digital asset clients.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes audit evidence, role-based access, decision logs, and governance workflows into a single control layer that enables procurement teams to efficiently verify compliance and maintain evidence integrity.
workflow_title: From access policy to audit-ready logs
workflow_description: SFTY moves role-based permissions and deployment controls through audit logging, evidence governance and decision traceability to support procurement auditability and compliance trust.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Audit-ready evidence control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides procurement teams with a secured compliance layer that links provider outputs to workflows, preserving evidence and enabling clear audit trails for institutional review.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASPs with controlled workflows, preserved evidence, and enterprise deployment options designed to meet rigorous procurement governance and audit requirements.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for procurement teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides procurement teams with a transparent, auditable compliance layer featuring role-based access, clear evidence trails, and governance controls designed for institutional procurement needs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support audit-ready workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures compliance workflows by connecting provider outputs with internal rules, case management, decision logs and reporting to deliver consistent, scalable, audit-ready compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history, decision records and linked case materials to support reviewability and traceability aligned with institutional audit and procurement standards.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into a connected compliance workflow without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers and transforms their outputs into structured workflows without replacing underlying KYC, KYT or other compliance tools.
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, evidence integrity and traceable compliance workflows for institutional procurement teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
